mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_GUESTBOOK_REPLY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_GUESTBOOK_REPLY (ID, GUESTBOOK_REPLY_CONTENT, GUESTBOOK_ID, WRITER_MEMBER_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{guestbookReplyContent}, #{guestbookId}, #{writerMemberId})
mapper.select: SELECT TBRP.ID, TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REPLY_CONTENT, TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REPLY_CREATED_AT, TBRP.GUESTBOOK_ID, TBRP.WRITER_MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS WRITER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS WRITER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK_REPLY_LIKE TBRPL WHERE TBRPL.GUESTBOOK_REPLY_ID = TBRP.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK_REPLY TBRP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBRP.WRITER_MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBRP.GUESTBOOK_ID = #{guestbookId} ORDER BY TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REPLY_CREATED_AT ASC
